message:
fix: gt hook status resolves correct rig database regardless of CWD

runMoleculeStatus() used findLocalBeadsDir() which walks from CWD.
From the town root (~/gt), it found ~/gt/.beads (dolt_database: hq),
but hooked beads like bd-pr-sheriff live in the bd database.

Add ResolveHookDir-based resolution (matching runHookShow logic)
to resolve the beads directory from the agent bead ID prefix
rather than CWD.

Fixes: bd-hook-status-cwd-bug

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew
